{"query":"Hades II Odysius Arachne prophecy narrated conclusion scene Faded list updated artwork quality of life update","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1665,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3581451698","title":"Steam Community :: Guide :: Silk and Spitefulness Achievement Guide (Contains Spoilers)","content":"This item is incompatible with Hades II.
Im unsure on when exactly you can start this Quest since I didn't look that deep into the Code, but I did it after completing the Main Story (First Credits) but before the Epiloge/Achievement: Golden Age (Melinoe, Seek Us Minor Prophecy)
Please keep in mind, that other events may trigger other dialogues first.
So for example if you encounter Hecate while you have your Vow of Rivals active, she might instead prioritize a dialog that has to do with that.
Or if you encounter Athena after doing a Surface run, she might have dialogue referring to Prometheus etc.
If the correct dialog didn't pop up, just lose the run and try again.
Text: "Headmistress, there must be something we can do for Arachne.
Text: "You are preoccupied with that Arachne's curse!
I wasn't entirely forthright with you before, about your curse.
So, if you require closure on this aspect of your life... come visit at the Crossroads.
She didn't fashion a poison expressly to ruin your life.
She didn't even know you at the time."
Requires: Surface Run (so just to be safe, encounter Athena after City of Ephyra Bossfight, so Stage 2 or even Stage 3)
Text: "Arachne, now that we know Headmistress Hecate had a hand in your curse, there is some possibility we can persuade Athena to undo it.
Just, speak to how you've changed, how you wish to have your old self back!"},{"url":"https://hades.fandom.com/wiki/The_Unseen_Update","title":"The Unseen Update - Hades Wiki","content":"This article contains detailed information about Hades or Hades II that may spoil your enjoyment of discovering the game's secrets for yourself.
Our third Major Update in Early Access is now available, featuring an all-new Hidden Aspect for each of the Nocturnal Arms, a unique new variation of each Guardian Encounter, and plenty of new story events, artwork, music, and more!
Hidden Aspects: Each of the Nocturnal Arms now has a secret, final form to discover...
New Music: Listen for new pieces including a hot new single from a certain band...
Life Affirmation (Aphrodite): cut from game (sort of); replaced with...
Give up all your Gold; after the next Guardian, gain it back, with interest!
Also adjusted power levels of various Duo Boons, including...
Trial of the Supreme: new!
Rewards you for waking Hypnos, though this cannot be done just yet...
Several characters now have all of their Gift events (others are still to be added)
You now can make another attempt to rouse Hypnos from his endless slumber, after a certain point..."}]}
